free_text: Natural parity states of Ne-20 for 12<Ex<15.5 MeV.
99.995% 2O gas target at a pressure approximately
530 Pa (4 Torr) gave a thickness of only a few keV.
19 surface barrier detectors were located in
steps of 5 degree from 25 to 170 degree.
Absolute calibration error of the accelerator.
From 30 to 150 degrees, systematic uncertainties are
<2%, but for extreme forward and backward angles
Errors are from Gaussian peak fitting
Fit equally well using spin of 5-.
Uncertainty is the change in the parameter
